basic.description:
{Warfare — Basic}

These three skills are permanently linked. Learning or leveling any one of them automatically raises all three to the same level.

Ballistics (Catapult)
Hero takes control of the catapult. Scores 1 extra hit on walls per combat turn during sieges.

Artillery (Ballista)
Hero takes control of the ballista. Ballista has a 50% chance to deal double damage on each shot.

First Aid (First Aid Tent)
Hero takes control of the first aid tent. Restores up to 50 hit points to one friendly unit stack per turn.

advanced.description:
{Warfare — Advanced}

These three skills are permanently linked. Learning or leveling any one of them automatically raises all three to the same level.

Ballistics (Catapult)
Hero takes control of the catapult. Scores 2 extra hits on walls per combat turn during sieges.

Artillery (Ballista)
Hero takes control of the ballista. Ballista has a 75% chance to deal double damage. Attacks twice per round.

First Aid (First Aid Tent)
Hero takes control of the first aid tent. Restores up to 75 hit points to one friendly unit stack per turn.

expert.description:
{Warfare — Expert}

These three skills are permanently linked. Learning or leveling any one of them automatically raises all three to the same level.

Ballistics (Catapult)
Hero takes control of the catapult. Scores 3 extra hits per turn. Catapult can target any wall section.

Artillery (Ballista)
Hero takes control of the ballista. Ballista never misses. Always deals double damage. Attacks twice per round.

First Aid (First Aid Tent)
Hero takes control of the first aid tent. Restores up to 100 hit points per turn. Can resurrect fallen units.
